home.metaTitle: WR Doors — Premium Doors & Home Services in UAE

home.heroSubtitle: 1,000+ designs. Triple guard against water, sound, and termites. Built in our local factory and backed by a 10-year warranty.

products.metaDescription: Explore our full range of premium WPC doors, pivot aluminium entries, sliding systems and wall cladding — manufactured in the UAE with a 10-year warranty.
products.heroTitle: Doors for every home, every vision
products.heroSubtitle: 8 signature designs across 4 categories — all manufactured in our UAE factory and available in custom dimensions.

tripleGuard.title: Triple Guard Protection
tripleGuard.subtitle: Every WR Doors product is engineered against the three biggest threats to doors in the UAE climate.

water.title: Water Resistant
water.body: Our WPC composite core is completely sealed against moisture — essential in UAE's 85–100% summer humidity.

sound.title: Sound Insulated
sound.body: Dense composite construction reduces airborne noise by up to 35 dB, creating quieter, more private spaces.

termite.title: Termite Proof
termite.body: No organic wood content in the structural core means zero termite risk — backed by our 10-year warranty.

quoteModal.successBody: We'll reply within 24 hours. For a faster response, message us on WhatsApp.

categories.wpcDoorsSubtitle: Premium Wood Plastic Composite for interiors and wet zones
categories.wpcDoorsDesc: Humidity-resistant Wood Plastic Composite for interior doors, bathroom doors, and custom sizes.
categories.pivotDoorsSubtitle: Luxury exterior entryways with bold proportions
categories.pivotDoorsDesc: Statement entryways in 6000-series aluminium — built for UAE villas with powder-coat finishes that resist salt and dust.
categories.slidingSystemsSubtitle: Glass and aluminium space-savers for modern interiors
categories.slidingSystemsDesc: Glass-and-aluminium space-savers with floor-flush soft-close tracks — ideal for open-plan apartments.
categories.wallCladdingSubtitle: Fluted and patterned panels that elevate any room
categories.wallCladdingDesc: Fluted and patterned WPC panels that transform accent walls — available in walnut, oak, and custom finishes.

services.metaDescription: Free consultations, supply & installation, on-demand technicians, and custom door design across the UAE.
services.heroTitle: Professional door services across the UAE
services.heroSubtitle: From the first site visit to the final installation — we handle every stage of your door project.

consultation.title: Free Consultation
consultation.description: Book a site visit and our team will measure your space, recommend the best door options, and provide a detailed written quotation — at no charge.

installation.title: Supply & Installation
installation.description: We supply your chosen door from our factory and install it with our own trained team. Includes frame, hardware, and finishing.

technician.title: On-Demand Technicians
technician.description: Need a carpenter, plumber, or fitter? Book an hourly specialist for adjustments, repairs, or new installations — fast response across the UAE.

custom.title: Custom Design
custom.description: Have a specific vision? We work with you to create bespoke door designs — custom dimensions, finishes, and hardware for any space.

services.ctaTitle: Not sure which service you need?
services.ctaBody: Message us on WhatsApp and we'll guide you to the right option for your project.

about.metaDescription: WR Doors is a UAE-based premium doors and home services brand, powered by the DODA digital platform. Local factory, 10-year warranty, bilingual support.
about.heroTitle: Premium doors. Crafted in the UAE.
about.heroSubtitle: A local manufacturer building doors and surfaces that last — backed by a tech-forward digital platform.
about.storyTitle: Built locally, designed for the UAE climate
about.storyP1: WR Doors began as a family-led trading business in the UAE — a response to homeowners struggling to find doors that could survive coastal humidity, intense summer heat, and the salt-laden air of the Gulf.
about.storyP2: Today our local factory produces premium WPC interior doors, pivot aluminium entries, sliding systems, and wall cladding for villas, apartments, and commercial spaces across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and the Northern Emirates.
about.storyP3: Every product carries our Triple Guard warranty: protection against water, sound, and termites — backed by a 10-year guarantee and a service network that responds within 24 hours.
about.dodaIntro: WR Doors is the first consumer brand on the DODA platform — a digital infrastructure built for premium home-services companies in the Gulf.
about.dodaB1Body: Every customer touchpoint — website, forms, booking, follow-up — works equally well in English and Arabic, with full RTL support.
about.dodaB2Body: DODA's architecture lets us extend into new categories and locations without rebuilding from scratch. WR Doors is the start.
about.dodaB3Body: Lead capture, technician dispatch, and after-sales support all run on the same platform — so nothing slips between teams.
about.factoryBody: Our UAE-based production line is staffed by trained carpenters and quality-assurance specialists. Every door passes a five-point QA before it ships, and we keep finished stock of our most-ordered designs to cut wait times.
about.value1Body: Built in the UAE — no shipping delays, faster turnarounds, and on-site support when you need it.
about.value2Body: Water-resistant, sound-dampening, and termite-proof construction — engineered for the Gulf climate.
about.value3Body: Industry-leading guarantee on every door, with a dedicated technician network for service calls.
about.value4Body: Every interaction — quote, booking, follow-up — available in English or Arabic, your choice.
about.legalBody: WR Doors is operated by Wahat Al Ruman Doors Trading LLC, a UAE-registered company. Our trade licence and registered office details are available on request.
about.legalNameEn: Wahat Al Ruman Doors Trading LLC
about.ctaSubtitle: Book a free consultation or request a quote — we'll respond within 24 hours.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with WR Doors in the UAE — phone, WhatsApp, email, or the contact form. We respond within 24 hours.
contact.heroSubtitle: Tell us about your project — we'll get back to you within 24 hours, in English or Arabic.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill in the form and we'll respond by your preferred channel.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, timeline, and any specific requirements…
contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out — our team will respond within 24 hours. For urgent matters, message us on WhatsApp.
contact.mapBody: We serve the entire UAE — Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and the Northern Emirates.
